mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `grade_salary_range` WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY grade_code ASC
SELECT * FROM `grade_salary_range` WHERE grade_code = #{gradeCode} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `grade_salary_range` (grade_code, min_salary, max_salary, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{gradeCode}, #{minSalary}, #{maxSalary}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE `grade_salary_range` SET grade_code = #{gradeCode}, min_salary = #{minSalary}, max_salary = #{maxSalary}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
